texto: Her eyes were a rich dark brown that were so deep, they reminded me of my sleepless nights, awake, staring into complete darkness. I felt compelled to look deeper, searching for something inside her, but her soul was covered and her eyes would not show me.
explicacao: Citação de Cristina Martin sobre temas ligados a amor. “Her eyes were a rich dark brown that were so deep, they reminded me of my sleepless nights, awake…” articula amor, fiction, literary em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

texto: The city was a machine of its own, continuously producing. We were constantly pumped out through its assembly line, in different forms or models. We came hardwired with different stories, dark secrets, vices, and defects. Over time, we fail and come to find our end, but the city continues onwards.
explicacao: Citação de Cristina Martín sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The city was a machine of its own, continuously producing. We were constantly pumped out through …” articula tempo, fiction, mystery em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: The city was a machine of its own, continuously producing. We were constantly pumped out through its assembly line, in different forms or models. We came hardwired with different stories, dark secrets, vices, and defects. Over time, we fail and come to find our end, but the city continues onwards.

texto: If you focus your eyes towards the horizon, everything and everyone walking in front of you becomes a blurry mass. That's what everyone else became. All of their dark wool suits began to mesh into one, and they began to rhythmically march in unison, all while I gazed at the sliver of sky that seemed to be pressed tightly in between the skyscrapers. I kept on walking and staring at the sky, and I began to notice the skyscrapers becoming larger and larger, and before I knew it, I had to turn to get to my building, and of course, the automat.
explicacao: Citação de Cristina Martin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If you focus your eyes towards the horizon, everything and everyone walking in front of you becom…” articula amor, automat, fiction em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e fiction.
